个人 IP｜商业与管理｜AI 咨询

tweets.text:
微信 ClawBot 的入口其实不一定要是龙虾。

本质是 Agent + IM 的协议层已经打通了。
你在微信发一句话，背后有个 Agent 去干活。

那这个入口可以是龙虾、豆包、千问，也可以支付、搜索、电商、甚至你自己公司的服务，其实都无所谓。

名字不重要，壳也不重要。

x.name: Alex Hormozi
x.bio: Co-Founder: https://t.co/gQN7OehYd2, https://t.co/VLS8LzeasI. Business Owners: Get your 2026 free scaling roadmap 👇

tweets.text:
Levels of influence:
1) Tell them what to do with authority
2) Incentivize them with reward
3) Sell them on it with persuasion
4) Get them to think it was their idea
If you want buy in, don't just sell, seed. We defend what we help create.

You can't both be in control of your life and also blame other people for it. Taking responsibility is about power not blame. You do it for yourself, not because you think the other person deserves forgiveness.
